steps.t: Isildur's son Ornaher is at Díngarth.
Fearful soldiers can be found at Díngarth, despairing at the news of the approaching Rhúnhoth horde.
Words are no more use to the despairing soldiers of the Great Alliance. Better now to collect the weapons they cast aside with the hope that they will…
You have gathered many weapons cast aside by despairing soldiers at Díngarth, and should bring them to Ornaher for distribution to those who may still…
Frightened Men and Elves can be found at Díngarth. Ornaher believes tales of Elendil's sword Narsil and Gil-galad's spear Aiglos may inspire the frigh…
Tárandil is at Díngarth, and he desires to speak with you.
